name: faceswap
description: AI-powered face swap service - Use verging.ai directly from command line. Supports local video files and images, remote video URLs (YouTube, Bilibili, etc.), remote image URLs, auto-download remote resources, real-time progress tracking, video trimming.
author: verging.ai

env.name: VERGING_API_KEY
env.description: verging.ai API Key - get from https://verging.ai (Login → Click avatar → API Keys)

env.name: VERGING_API_URL
env.description: verging.ai API URL (optional, defaults to https://verging.ai/api/v1)
